use_cases: Application-level navigation menus with dropdown submenus
Desktop-style file/edit/help menu structures for web apps
Command palette trigger areas with grouped actions
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based menubar component providing desktop-style navigation with dropdown menus, triggers, sub-triggers, and grouped actions. Built with accessibility in mind using native keyboard navigation and focus management. Supports custom styling through Tailwind CSS with standard hover, focus, and active states.
